title: clitoria polyphylla
intro: Clitoria polyphylla, also known as the butterfly pea or Asian pigeonwings, is a perennial legume native to tropical Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Clitoria polyphylla include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting cardiovascular health. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or infusion, and its leaves can also be used in herbal preparations such as tinctures and decoctions.
